project.name: sui-pilot
project.description: Claude Code plugin turning Claude into a Sui/Move expert: doc-grounded guidance, a Move-LSP MCP server for live diagnostics, and a sui-prover MCP server for formal verification (specify/verify).

nodes.name: plugin.json
nodes.summary: Plugin manifest. Declares sui-pilot and wires its two stdio MCP servers (move-lsp, sui-prover) as node subprocesses via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}. The root of the dependency graph.

nodes.name: ci.yml
nodes.summary: CI: builds + tests both MCP servers.

nodes.name: refresh-docs.yml
nodes.summary: Scheduled CI that refreshes the vendored doc corpus.

nodes.name: sui-pilot-agent.md
nodes.summary: The Sui Move specialist subagent: doc-grounded guidance + live LSP diagnostics. 532 lines of behavior spec.

nodes.name: CLAUDE.md
nodes.summary: Repo guidance for Claude when working inside sui-pilot.

nodes.name: move-code-quality.md
nodes.summary: /move-code-quality — Move 2024 Edition idiom & syntax compliance against the Move Book checklist.

nodes.name: move-code-review.md
nodes.summary: /move-code-review — security/architecture/design audit (SEC-* findings) for Move contracts.

nodes.name: oz-math.md
nodes.summary: /oz-math — flags risky arithmetic and recommends OpenZeppelin math (mul_div, fixed-point).

nodes.name: specify.md
nodes.summary: /specify — authors #[spec(prove)] formal specs for every externally-reachable fn, drives sui-prover. Producer half of the FV split.

nodes.name: sui-pilot.md
nodes.summary: Primary slash command — the doc-grounded Sui Move assistant with LSP integration.

nodes.name: verify.md
nodes.summary: /verify — re-checks specs hold against current code; --strict is the CI gate. Consumer half of the FV split.

nodes.name: BASELINE.md
nodes.summary: Recorded baseline results for the eval comparison harness.

nodes.summary: The eval task bank (502 lines) — prompts sui-pilot is benchmarked against.

nodes.summary: Builds the docs index (llms.txt) over the synced corpus.

nodes.name: llms.txt
nodes.summary: Machine-readable index of the bundled documentation corpus.

nodes.name: esbuild.config.mjs
nodes.summary: esbuild bundling config for the MCP server.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Node package manifest for an MCP server.

nodes.name: binary-discovery.ts
nodes.summary: Locates the move-analyzer / sui binary across install layouts.

nodes.name: document-store.ts
nodes.summary: In-memory document/version tracking for LSP didOpen/didChange.

nodes.name: errors.ts
nodes.summary: Typed error definitions for the server.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Entry point for the move-lsp MCP stdio server.

nodes.name: lsp-client.ts
nodes.summary: Heart of the LSP server (1250 lines): JSON-RPC client to the Move language server, lifecycle, request/response plumbing, crash recovery.

nodes.name: server.ts
nodes.summary: move-lsp MCP server (1019 lines): exposes LSP capabilities as MCP tools to the agent.

nodes.name: workspace.ts
nodes.summary: Resolves Move workspaces/packages so the LSP opens the right roots.

nodes.name: esbuild.config.mjs
nodes.summary: esbuild bundling config for the MCP server.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Node package manifest for an MCP server.

nodes.name: errors.ts
nodes.summary: Typed error definitions for the server.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Entry point for the sui-prover MCP stdio server.

nodes.name: move-toml.ts
nodes.summary: Reads/edits Move.toml to stage spec packages for proving.

nodes.name: parse-output.ts
nodes.summary: Parses raw sui-prover output into structured pass/fail/violation results (511 lines — the parser core).

nodes.name: prove.ts
nodes.summary: Runs sui-prover on a package and streams results (219 lines).

nodes.name: server.ts
nodes.summary: sui-prover MCP server: exposes prove/list-specs as MCP tools.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project front door — what sui-pilot is and how to install it.

nodes.name: sync-docs.sh
nodes.summary: Syncs the 753-doc corpus (sui/walrus/seal/move-book/ts-sdk/prover) into the plugin. Grounding pipeline.

nodes.name: Plugin Surface
nodes.summary: Claude Code plugin: manifest, slash commands, and the specialist agent.

nodes.name: Skills
nodes.summary: Skill definitions backing the slash commands (auto-activating on .move/Move.toml).

nodes.name: move-lsp MCP server
nodes.summary: Stdio MCP server wrapping the Move language server for live diagnostics.

nodes.name: sui-prover MCP server
nodes.summary: Stdio MCP server wrapping the sui-prover formal verifier.

nodes.name: Docs corpus & sync
nodes.summary: 753-doc grounding corpus and the scripts that refresh + index it.

nodes.name: Eval framework
nodes.summary: Task bank + comparison harness that benchmark sui-pilot's quality.

nodes.name: CI / Infra
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions: build/test + scheduled doc refresh + pages.

nodes.name: Formal Verification workflow
nodes.summary: The crown jewel: /specify authors #[spec(prove)] specs and proves them via sui-prover-mcp; /verify re-checks them (CI gate). A producer/consumer split keeping production source pristine.

nodes.name: Move review suite
nodes.summary: Three complementary lenses on Move code: /move-code-review (security SEC-*), /move-code-quality (Move 2024 idioms), /oz-math (arithmetic safety).

nodes.name: Doc-grounded + LSP guidance
nodes.summary: Answers are grounded in 753 vendored docs and validated against live LSP diagnostics rather than model memory.

edges.description: manifest registers the move-lsp MCP server
manifest registers the sui-prover MCP server
raw prover output is parsed into structured results

layers.name: Plugin Surface
layers.description: Manifest, slash commands, and the specialist agent — what users invoke.

layers.name: move-lsp MCP server
layers.description: Live Move diagnostics via the language server.

layers.name: Eval framework
layers.description: Task bank + comparison harness measuring quality.

tour.title: Start at the manifest
tour.description: plugin.json wires sui-pilot together: 6 commands, 1 agent, and two stdio MCP servers (move-lsp, sui-prover). Everything hangs off here.

tour.title: The user-facing surface
tour.description: The specialist agent plus the slash commands users actually invoke.

tour.title: Live Move diagnostics (move-lsp MCP)
tour.description: The move-lsp server speaks JSON-RPC to the Move language server. lsp-client.ts (1250 lines) is the engine; server.ts exposes it as MCP tools.

tour.title: Formal verification (sui-prover MCP)
tour.description: prove.ts runs sui-prover; parse-output.ts (511 lines) turns raw output into structured pass/fail.

tour.title: The FV workflow — the crown jewel
tour.description: /specify authors specs and proves them; /verify re-checks them later (--strict is the CI gate). A clean producer/consumer split.

tour.title: The review suite
tour.description: Three complementary lenses: security review, Move 2024 quality, and OpenZeppelin-math arithmetic safety.

tour.title: Why answers are trustworthy
tour.description: Guidance is grounded in 753 vendored docs (synced via sync-docs.sh) and checked against live LSP diagnostics — not model memory.

tour.title: How quality is measured
tour.description: The eval framework benchmarks sui-pilot against a 502-line task bank with a baseline comparison harness.
